repos.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
repos.desc: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

repos.name: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
repos.desc: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

repos.name: apple/container
repos.desc: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

repos.name: interviewstreet/hiring-agent
repos.desc: AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.

repos.name: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
repos.desc: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

repos.name: revfactory/harness
repos.desc: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.

repos.name: flutter/flutter
repos.desc: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

repos.name: andreknieriem/headunit-revived
repos.desc: Headunit App for displaying Android Auto

repos.name: stablyai/orca
repos.desc: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

repos.name: google-labs-code/design.md
repos.desc: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

repos.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
repos.desc: The agent that grows with you
